# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Check presentation-oriented formatting where concrete examples or snapshots are clearer than property thinking.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The behavior is mostly about presentation details or narrow snapshots, so invariant framing is not the best fit.
## Expected object
A deflection toward example-based or snapshot-based validation instead of property reasoning.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this skill when the task is mainly about formatting or localized presentation behavior.
## Verification hooks
The response should avoid inventing a broad invariant for a narrow presentation concern.
